creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I was able to reproduce and together with the ftp.freebsd.org 
hostmaster, we resolved this, mostly likely a glitch in the transfer(s), 
the incorrect version had no obvious changes (compared with cmp -x). 
Resolving the ticket, thanks for the notifcation, and the willingness to 
improve FreeBSD
